document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Eastern Passage/Cow Bay

provisions.text: FP USES PERMITTED Forestry uses, involving no buildings Agricultural uses, involving no buildings Passive recreation uses Historic sites and monuments Public parks and playgrounds Conservation uses Water control structures (RC-Jun 25/14;E-Oct 18/14) Wastewater, stormwater and water infrastructure (RC-Jun 25/14;E-Oct 18/14)
FP ZONE REQUIREMENTS Minimum Lot Area: 10,000 square feet Minimum Lot Frontage: 100 feet

OTHER REQUIREMENTS: INFILLING For any parcel of land which is zoned FP and within the one hundred (100) foot buffer referred to in Clause 4.18(a)(ii), no infilling, excavation, alteration of grade or removal of vegetation shall be permitted. The construction of boardwalks or the placement of walking/hiking trails shall be permitted provided that no infilling or alteration of grade takes place other than the placement of piles or the placement of trails on top of existing grade.

content_blocks.text: Forestry uses, involving no buildings Agricultural uses, involving no buildings Passive recreation uses Historic sites and monuments Public parks and playgrounds Conservation uses Water control structures (RC-Jun 25/14;E-Oct 18/14) Wastewater, stormwater and water infrastructure (RC-Jun 25/14;E-Oct 18/14)
Minimum Lot Area: 10,000 square feet Minimum Lot Frontage: 100 feet

For any parcel of land which is zoned FP and within the one hundred (100) foot buffer referred to in Clause 4.18(a)(ii), no infilling, excavation, alteration of grade or removal of vegetation shall be permitted. The construction of boardwalks or the placement of walking/hiking trails shall be permitted provided that no infilling or alteration of grade takes place other than the placement of piles or the placement of trails on top of existing grade.

open_issues.description: Clause patterns listed in pending_review_clause_patterns were preserved raw because their hierarchy normalization is not yet approved in this repository context.
